Metadata.title: Vault — Online Auctions & Buy Now
Metadata.description: Bid on or buy unique items, collectibles and rarities — from jewellery and art to classic cars. Secure Stripe payments, fair auction close.

hero.headline: Bid, buy, win — online.
hero.subline: List items, place your bids or buy instantly at a fixed price.

auctions.title: Current listings
auctions.empty: There are no active listings right now. Check back soon!

step1.title: Browse
step1.text: Explore live auctions and find what interests you.

step2.title: Bid
step2.text: Place your bid and keep an eye on the remaining time.

step3.title: Win & pay
step3.text: As the highest bidder you win when it ends and pay securely.

autos.label: Cars & Motorcycles
autos.text: Classics and dream machines on wheels.

einrichtung.label: Furnishings
einrichtung.text: Design pieces that shape a room.

features.title: What you can rely on
features.intro: From payment to the closing time, everything runs securely and transparently.

item1.title: Secure payment processing
item1.text: Runs through Stripe — your payment details never touch us.

item2.title: Automatic notifications
item2.text: An email the moment you're outbid or win.

item3.title: Fair auction close
item3.text: Ends automatically at the set time, the same for everyone.

Legal.placeholder: This page is a placeholder for a portfolio project and does not yet contain legally binding content.

new.title: Create listing
new.subline: Describe your item, set up an auction and/or a fixed price, and add an image.

edit.title: Edit listing
edit.subline: Update the details of your listing.
edit.pricingLocked: This listing already has bids — start price, duration and fixed price are locked. You can still change the title, description, category and image.

upload.cta: Drag an image here or click to choose
upload.optional: Optional — a placeholder is shown when no image is set.

sections.auctionHint: Optional: set a starting price and duration so people can bid.
sections.buyNowHint: Optional: a fixed price at which the listing can be bought instantly.
